sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0;
SELECT USE_DATE, USE_GADGET, FONT_SIZE FROM TBL_MEMO_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG SET USE_DATE = #use_date#, USE_GADGET = #use_gadget#, FONT_SIZE = #font_size# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
